items.title: South Africa's police chief to appear in court over controversial health contract
items.dek: South African authorities declined to disclose the charges he will face when he stands in the dock.
items.body: South African authorities declined to disclose the charges he will face when he stands in the dock.

items.title: Musketeer d'Artagnan's remains believed found under Dutch church
items.dek: D'Artagnan was killed during the Siege of Maastricht in 1673 and later immortalised in the stories of Alexandre Dumas.
items.body: D'Artagnan was killed during the Siege of Maastricht in 1673 and later immortalised in the stories of Alexandre Dumas.
